title: Tender Russian Potato Pilaf
description: A sour and pillowy Russian dish featuring starch, this potato pilaf is a delicious and light meal option, reduced to perfection without onions or garlic.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they are tender and lightly browned.
Add the grated carrots and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked mushrooms and carrots, diced potatoes, tomato paste, sour cream, dried dill, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well to combine, then stir in the chicken broth.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the top is lightly browned.
